title: Sweet Fish Curry
description: A delicious and spicy fish curry dish with a hint of sweetness. This kenyan-inspired recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the fish and cook until browned on both sides, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the sweet curry powder and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve over rice or with naan.
